CONTRE: Selection and failure decomposition use already-observed development outcomes from 0018. They direct development mutations but are not independent confirmation and cannot justify shadow promotion.

selection_policy.near_pass_rule: top 16 non-passers by frozen equal-weight normalized target, stress economics, consistency, MLL safety and velocity score
selection_policy.top_decile_rule: intersection of top ceil(10% * 512) normal and stressed median net
